calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/mother, Aizhu Huang, is appearing in propia persona on behalf of the Minor child, Quantum He.
Cantonese Interpreter, Hai Ming, is present to interpret for the petitioner.

Petitioner/father, Jinming He, is not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Aizhu Huang is sworn and examined by the Court through the Cantonese interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the Minors at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to: QUANTUM ZHUO. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
